summary.title: Mangalore Smart City tender and project records
caveats: Public party leads are not the same as verified tender winners.
The source corpus is selected around Mangaluru Smart City and related public works records.
Local filesystem paths, raw payload blobs, and private trace hashes are not included in this public release.
